# machinen

> Run frontier AI locally. Pause, resume, or fork VMs to run on different hosts. Handoff for VMs.

A native arm64 microVM runtime. Node.js is the first-class target; Python, bash, and anything else that boots in a Linux VM works too. Snapshot, restore, and fork live processes across hosts with their heap, file descriptors, and timers intact — purpose-built for running frontier AI workloads on hardware you control.

The runtime source is not yet published. The companion website source is at https://github.com/redwoodjs/machinen.dev.

## Pages

- [Landing](https://machinen.dev/index.md): One-line pitch and project status.

## Reference

- [README](https://github.com/redwoodjs/machinen.dev/blob/main/README.md): Install, quickstart (bake / boot / handoff), fork, and runtime API.
- [Repository](https://github.com/redwoodjs/machinen.dev): Marketing site source. Runtime source is not yet public.
